title: BRANDLE OS — ENGRAMAESTRO ADDENDUM II INTEGRATION PACK

sections.title: Source Ingested
sections.summary: ENGRAMAESTRO Thread Vault (copy 2) containing addendum material for brandL/4IELD/4TRESS plus pricing, onboarding, pitch deck.

sections.title: Pricing & Entitlements
sections.summary: Locks tier names and entitlements; adds export formats and enterprise features.

sections.title: Copy Library
sections.summary: Stores onboarding hero copy, intake microcopy, and outreach templates as versioned assets.

sections.title: Pitch Deck Generator
sections.summary: Adds 3XEC module to generate a 12-slide pitch deck and investor narrative from project inputs.

sections.title: UX + Model Health Meter
sections.summary: Adds global My Archive access (V4ULT) and a confusion gauge with thresholds + audit logs.

sections.title: 4TRESS Safety Rules
sections.summary: Hard constraints: not legal advice; no C&D; no threats; no guarantees; safe templates and flows.

summary: Integrates Engramaestro Addendum II into BRANDLE OS: pricing tiers, onboarding copy, pitch deck generation, and reinforced brand protection & intelligence modules.
